query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: Diagonal bands of green and orange-red span the frame from edge to edge at a slight downward angle, forming parallel streaks of varying width and intensity that fill the entire surface.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: Diagonal bands of green and orange-red fill the frame at a slight downward angle, rendered with heavy intentional blur into flowing parallel streaks of varying width and intensity. The image is an abstract photograph that abandons representational clarity and recognizable subject matter, presenting only smeared layers of color and linear gesture.
